name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Closed trades: drop the 12h cutoff so all trades the poller pulls (last 7 days) are emitted, and floor zero-duration fills to entry+60s instead of dropping them. Server now waits for the userscript's force_cleanup ack before replaying state on WS connect, eliminating the race where replay shapes were drawn during cleanup and then wiped by the trailing removeAllShapes — closed trades stay on chart across reconnects.
